discrepancies.title: Forbidden-verb pre-write occurrence in m10_documented_commitment.md sec 1
discrepancies.description: Initial first-write of the substrate file contained one FV violation on L37: 'M9 V0 is established by the cited papers'. Caught by post-write FV scan; remediated in-fire to 'M9 V0 is anchored in the cited papers'. No downstream substrate references the original wording.

discrepancies.title: STEP 0.5 ASCII-discipline pre-write violation: U+00A7 in cross-reference labels
discrepancies.description: Initial first-write contained two unicode 'sec-symbol' (U+00A7) characters on L172 and L181 in cross-reference field labels referring to slot 139 sec 4 / slot 140 sec 5 / sec 6. Per STEP 0.5, Branch B writes ASCII-only. Caught by post-write non-ASCII byte scan (4 high-bytes detected); remediated in-fire to ASCII 'sec'.
discrepancies.remediation: edit tool 2-string replacements; re-scan PASS (0 non-ASCII bytes)

discrepancies.title: .fleet.yaml line-count drift from prompt 141 reference
discrepancies.description: Prompt 141 SECTION B-B references '.fleet.yaml' as 716 lines (consistent with slot 138 fleet-bootstrap commit message); actual file at fire time is 711 lines (5-line drift, likely from FLEET-YAML-HOUSEKEEPING commit 69606ac on 2026-05-10 which injected slot 137 + slot 136 landed metadata blocks but a subsequent re-format trimmed lines). Does not affect insertion logic; insertion point identified by content (after open_items[] terminator at L685, before tracking: section comment at L686-688).
